card.name: Alliance of Arms
card.text: Join forces — Starting with you, each player may pay any amount of mana. Each player creates X 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens, where X is the total amount of mana paid this way.

card.name: Archivist of Oghma
card.text: Flash Whenever an opponent searches their library, you gain 1 life and draw a card.

card.name: Armory Warden
card.text: Flying, vigilance This creature enters with half X +1/+1 counters on it, rounded down. When this creature enters, each player may search their library for an artifact or enchantment card with mana value X or less and put it onto the battlefield. Then each player who searched their library this way shuffles.

card.name: Charismatic Conqueror
card.text: Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.) Whenever an artifact or creature enters untaped under an opponent's control, they may tap that permanent. If they don't, you create a 1/1 white Vampire creature token with lifelink.

card.name: Council's Judgement
card.text: Will of the council — Starting with you, each player votes for a nonland permanent you don't control. Exile each permanent with the most votes or tied for the most votes.

card.name: Court of Ardenvale
card.text: When this enchantment enters, you become the monarch. At the beginning of your upkeep, return target permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand. If you're the monarch, return that permanent card to the battlefield instead.

card.name: Custodi Squire
card.text: Flying Will of the council — When this creature enters, starting with you, each player votes for an artifact, creature, or enchantment card in your graveyard. Return each card with the most votes or tied for most votes to your hand.

card.name: Cut a Deal
card.text: Each opponent draws a card, then you draw a card for each opponent who drew a card this way.

card.name: Dawnbreak Reclaimer
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your end step, choose a creature card in an opponent's graveyard, then that player chooses a creature card in your graveyard. You may return those cards to the battlefield under their owners' control.

card.name: Dreamspeaker Acolyte
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Whenever an opponent casts their second spell each turn or draws their second card each turn, you draw a card.

card.name: Fateful Absense
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker. Its controller investigates. (They create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Fey Steed
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, another target attacking creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn. Whenever a creature or planeswalker you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, you may draw a card.

card.name: Firemane Commando
card.text: Flying Whenever you attack with two or more creatures, draw a card. Whenever another player attacks with two or more creatures, they draw a card if none of those creatures attacked you.

card.name: Fortunate Few
card.text: Choose a nonland permanent you don't control, then each other player chooses a nonland permanent they don't control that hasn't been chosen this way. Destroy all other nonland permanents.

card.name: Immortal Obligation
card.text: Return target creature card from an opponent's graveyard to the battlefield under their control with a duty counter on it. For as long as that creature has a duty counter on it, it's goaded, can't attack you or a permanent you control, and can't block creatures you control.

card.name: Loran of the Third Path
card.text: Vigilance When Loran enters, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment. {T}: You and target opponent each draw a card.

card.name: Master of Ceremonies
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, each opponent chooses money, friends, or secrets. For each player who chose money, you and that player each create a Treasure token. For each player who chose friends, you and that player each create a 1/1 green and white Citizen creature token. For each player who chose secrets, you and that player each draw a card.

card.name: Nils, Discipline Enforcer
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, for each player, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature that player controls. Each creature with one or more counters on it can't attack you or planeswalkers you control unless its controller pays {X}, where X is the number of counters on that creature.

card.name: Oblation
card.text: The owner of target nonland permanent shuffles it into their library, then draws two cards.

card.name: Orzhov Advokist
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, each player may put two +1/+1 counters on a creature they control. If a player does, creatures that player controls can't attack you or planeswalkers you control until your next turn.

card.name: Ox Drover
card.text: Vigilance This creature can't be blocked by Oxen. Whenever this creature enters or attacks, target opponent creates a 2/4 white Ox creature token and you draw a card.

card.name: Privileged Edict
card.text: Council's directive — Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Sovereignty — Each player sacrifices a creature with the greatest power among creatures that player controls. • Assets — Each player sacrifices a creature with the greatest mana value among creatures that player controls. • Status — Each player sacrifices a legendary creature they control.

card.name: Promise of Loyalty
card.text: Each player puts a vow counter on a creature they control and sacrifices the rest. Each of those creatures can't attack you or planeswalkers you control for as long as it has a vow counter on it.

card.name: Redistributed Wealth
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, exile target spell or nonland permanent. Its controller creates a Treasure token. When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, the exiled card's owner may cast that card without paying its mana cost. {5}: This enchantment's controller sacrifices it. Any player may activate this ability.

card.name: Reinvigorating Giant
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, redistribute any number of players' life totals. (Each of those players gets one life total back.)

card.name: Secret Rendezvous
card.text: You and target opponent each draw three cards.

card.name: Smuggler's Share
card.text: At the beginning of each end step, draw a card for each opponent who drew two or more cards this turn, then create a Treasure token for each opponent who had two or more lands enter the battlefield under their control this turn.

card.name: Stroke of Midnight
card.text: Destroy target nonland permanent. Its controller creates a 1/1 white Human creature token.

card.name: Tenuous Truce
card.text: Enchant opponent At the beginning of enchanted opponent's end step, you and that player each draw a card. When you attack enchanted opponent or a planeswalker they control or when they attack you or a planeswalker you control, sacrifice Tenuous Truce.

card.name: Tirishon Envoy
card.text: Vigilance Council's dilemma — Whenever this creature attacks, starting with you, each player votes for anonymity or company. Each player who voted anonymity draws a card and puts a shield counter on this creature. Each player who voted company creates a 1/1 white Soldier creature token and puts a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Trial of Oko
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after IV.) I, II, III — Exile target nontoken creature an opponent controls until this Saga leaves the battlefield. IV — Starting with you, each player votes for innocent or guilty. If guilty gets more votes, the owner of each card exiled with this Saga puts that card on the bottom of their library. Citizens came from all of Culdona to learn the fate of the traitor.

card.name: Collective Voyage
card.text: Join forces — Starting with you, each player may pay any amount of mana. Each player searches their library for up to X basic land cards, where X is the total amount of mana paid this way, puts them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffles.

card.name: Dalthari Groundskeeper
card.text: Each player may play an additional land on each of their turns. Whenever a land enters the battlefield, that land's controller may put two +1/+1 counters on a creature they control. Creatures with counters on them are goaded and must be blocked each combat if able. (They attack each combat if able and attack a player other than you if able.)

card.name: Dreamloft Vineyard

card.name: Druid of Purification
card.text: When this creature enters, starting with you, each player may choose an artifact or enchantment you don't control. Destroy each permanent chosen this way.

card.name: Evolutionary Escalation

card.name: Ferox Visciator

(Its controller chooses whether to put a +1/+1 counter on it or give it haste.)

card.name: Generous Patron

card.name: Ketria Wayfinder

Each opponent who voted for gather creates a treasure token. If wander got more votes, draw two cards. If gather got more votes or the vote is tied, create two treasure tokens.

card.name: Lokain, Monstrous Advocate
card.text: Whenever Lokain attacks, starting with you, each player votes for profit or security. You create a number of Treasure tokens equal to twice the number of profit votes. Put a number of +1/+1 counters on each creature you control equal to the number of security votes.

Whenever a creature becomes blocked, that creature's controller reveals cards from the top of their library until they reveal a creature or land card. card.name: Rootweaver Druid

It gains vigilance and trample until end of turn. {V}{V} — Choose artifact or enchantment. Destroy all permanents of the chosen type. {V}{V}{V} — Draw cards equal to the greatest power among creatures you control.

card.name: Season of Weaving
card.text: Choose up to five {V} worth of modes. You may choose the same mode more than once. {V} — Draw a card. {V}{V} — Choose an artifact or creature you control. Create a token that's a copy of it. {V}{V}{V} — Return each nonland, nontoken permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Season of the Bold
